title: alnus cordifolia var. rotundifolia
intro: Alnus cordifolia var. rotundifolia, also known as the heartleaf mountain alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the alder family (Betulaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The heartleaf mountain alder has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Alnus cordifolia var. rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
